supersession_rationale: R-20 Python-based report/ module was superseded by R-21 log-viewer (JavaScript/HTML). Log-viewer takes JSONL logs as input and renders enrichment data visually. Confirmed by user on 2026-03-24 audit. The report/ directory was never needed — log-viewer serves the same observability goal with a simpler architecture.

backward_compatibility.rationale: User confirmed D1: HTML replaces markdown, not both formats

legacy_code_removal.rationale: All markdown generation logic replaced with HTML; old tests updated

option_selection.rationale: Single-file HTML generator with inline CSS — simplest approach matching all constraints

audit_note: 2026-03-24 audit found zero code for report/ module. User confirmed R-20 is superseded by R-21 (log-viewer). Log-viewer work was partially done in-session but some changes were lost — only base code remains in log-viewer/.
